detectors.description:
STARTToken.setOwner(address)._newOwner (STARTToken.sol#629) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = _newOwner (STARTToken.sol#635)

Reentrancy in STARTToken.refundTokens(address,address,uint256) (STARTToken.sol#709-721):
	External calls:
	- token.transfer(_refund,_value) (STARTToken.sol#717)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- RefundTokens(_token,_refund,_value) (STARTToken.sol#719)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [STARTToken.refundTokens(address,address,uint256)](STARTToken.sol#L709-L721):
	External calls:
	- [token.transfer(_refund,_value)](STARTToken.sol#L717)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [RefundTokens(_token,_refund,_value)](STARTToken.sol#L719)

	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow

	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2

	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
